meta.title: Inkwell Journal — Notes on the craft of software
meta.description: An editorial journal about design, engineering and process, built on OlonJS collections: every post and every tag is a first-class entity with its own page.

data.label: An OlonJS collections demo
data.title: Notes on the
data.subtitle: Essays on design, engineering and process — published as a living demo of cross-collection relations: every post belongs to many tags, and every tag knows its posts without storing them twice.

image.alt: Fountain pen nib in sharp close-up over paper

data.label: Fresh ink
data.title: Latest from the desk
data.description: The four most recent essays, pulled live from the posts collection and sorted by date.

data.label: Topics
data.title: Browse by topic
data.description: Six tags, one collection. Each card links to a tag page that computes its own post list from the relation.

stats.label: Essays published, each in a posts collection entry
Post-to-tag links resolved at render time

data.label: Start anywhere
data.title: Pick a thread, pull it
data.description: Every post links to its topics and every topic links back to its posts. That is the whole demo — and the whole point.
